inputs.text: Stunning portrait of a Korean idol-style woman with rose gold textured shag cut, small face and large expressive eyes radiating confident power. Shot on 135mm telephoto with compressed background, three-quarter view, off-center rule of thirds composition. She stands at a moonlit rooftop pool during blue hour twilight, ambient light casting soft cobalt and lavender tones across her flawless skin. Wearing a bohemian layered outfit with flowing fabrics catching the evening breeze. Extremely detailed skin pores, cinematic color grading, SDXL hyperrealism. Styled editorial makeup with subtle shimmer on cheekbones. One hand resting on a glass railing, chin slightly lifted, gaze commanding. Pool water reflects city lights behind her. No text, no watermarks.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, deformed, watermark, signature, extra fingers, cartoon, anime, painting
